description_long: This handgun features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly black and dark metallic finish, accented by red outlines and cyan-blue illuminated panels along the slide and frame. The barrel is elongated and cylindrical, giving the weapon a silenced or high-tech appearance, with a smooth, matte surface and subtle weathering. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a ribbed texture for enhanced handling, and the trigger guard is thick and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement. The magazine base is rectangular and slightly extended, with a flat bottom and visible seams. Cyan-blue highlights and paneling on the slide and frame suggest an advanced or sci-fi aesthetic, possibly indicating electronic or energy-based functionality. No visible manufacturer markings or serial numbers are present, but the overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials.
description: A futuristic black handgun with red accents, cyan-blue illuminated panels, and an elongated barrel. The grip is ribbed and ergonomic, and the design features a sci-fi aesthetic with advanced paneling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handgun, including the illuminated cyan-blue panels, ribbed grip, and elongated barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical design of the slide and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the illuminated panels and grip details, with the magazine base and trigger guard clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, grip, and the magazine base, with the barrel's end visible at the top.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a ribbed texture along the back and sides for improved traction. The surface appears to be made of a matte black polymer with subtle red accent lines along the edges, enhancing both aesthetics and grip security. There are no visible logos or finger grooves, but the lower portion of the grip is slightly flared for better control. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on functionality and comfort.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement and gloved use. It has a smooth, matte finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and the curvature is gentle without any squared-off edges or undercuts. The design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection and accessibility over decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is elongated and cylindrical, resembling a suppressor or integrated silencer, with a smooth, matte black finish and subtle red accent lines. There are no visible ports, threads, or compensators, and the profile is uniform along its length. The exterior is unmarked, contributing to the weapon's streamlined, futuristic appearance.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The only decorative elements are the cyan-blue illuminated panels and red accent lines, which are integrated into the slide's design and contribute to its high-tech aesthetic.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is rectangular and flat, with a slight extension beyond the grip for easy removal. The edges are beveled, and the surface is smooth with visible seams, but there are no finger rests, logos, or additional texturing. The design is simple and functional, matching the overall modern style of the handgun.
